title: Freshly Fried Italian Shirataki Suppli
description: A keto-friendly Italian dish featuring shirataki, served in a bamboo tray, with a dense and pungent flavor, nostalgic of traditional Italian cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine shirataki noodles, grana padano cheese, parmesan cheese, eggs, almond flour, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Spoon the mixture into a bamboo tray lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the olive oil over the top of the mixture.
Fold the parchment paper over the mixture to form a papillote.
Bake for 20 minutes, then remove the parchment paper and fry in hot oil until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the suppli from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the suppli hot, garnished with additional parmesan cheese and parsley if desired.
